title: hydrocotyle coriacea
intro: Hydrocotyle coriacea, also known as Australian pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia, characterized by its delicate, round leaves and creeping stems. Traditionally, Australian pennywort has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting cardiovascular health. Australian pennywort is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
